claims.claim: プレステージビューティー市場においてブランド・地域・チャネルを多様化した「複数の成長エンジン」ポートフォリオが、特定市場の逆風下でも成長を維持する構造的安定性をもたらしている
claims.evidence: Q4 2015 Prepared Remarks（CEO発言）: 'We achieved very strong results, which were fueled by our multiple engines of growth in all regions, despite significant currency headwinds... by having developed a more balanced and diversified business over the last years across brands, geographies and channels. These important characteristics have become the key pillar that will help us continue to deliver long-term sustainable profitable growth.'

evidence_sources.speaker: Fabrizio Freda

claims.evidence: Q1 2015 Q&A（CEO発言）: 'the market, that grew about 5%, overall, in the quarter... prestige beauty, in the U.S. is growing and is continue to grow faster than mass. claims.claim: 肌科学研究への継続的なR&D投資が、スキンケア製品の差別化された処方（ingredient）と革新パイプラインを支えており、競合が容易に模倣できない障壁を形成している
claims.evidence: Q1 2015 Q&A（CFO発言）: 'Our R&D investment is -- we are making incremental investments this year in R&D. Some of those investments certainly are geared towards skin care. So that certainly should -- is anticipated to help our innovation plans in the next few years and is critical to our strategic growth plans. But we actually have been increasing our R&D investment the last couple of years.'

claims.claim: デジタルマーケティングへの移行（従来の30bps がTVからデジタルにシフト）とオンライン販売チャネルの強化が、広告費効率を改善しながら消費者エンゲージメントを高めている
claims.evidence: Q4 2015 Q&A（CFO発言）: 'if you were to think about it in terms of mix shift, about 30 basis points are shifting into digital out of traditional marketing.' / 'more of our brands do digital marketing than traditional marketing. So our digital spend is already higher than traditional marketing.'
